era_context: Fifth Dynasty Egypt; Sumerian city-states in Mesopotamia; Indus Valley Civilization in mature phase. A period of relative stability in major civilizations, though political fragmentation is advancing in Egypt.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No events are listed because no specific historical records survive for this year.
historiographic_note: 2734 BCE is not documented in any surviving source. This year, like the three preceding years, falls within a period for which only broad archaeological and administrative context exists. The absence of written chronology and the fragmentary nature of surviving records mean that individual years in the third millennium BCE cannot be distinguished in most cases. The historical record for this period is essentially a series of broad phases and contexts rather than year-by-year narratives.
